MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Set For Trial On Aug-17-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Answer
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Answer.

Defendant's motion for leave to file an amended answer is GRANTED. Courts exercise great liberality in allowing amendments to the answer. (Husley v. Koehler (1990) 218 Cal.App.3d 1150, 1159.) The delay in filing this motion is not prejudicial since the trial date is still months away. The parties have time to conduct additional discovery, if necessary. The reply cures any noncompliance with CRC 3.1324.

Defendant must file its amended answer within 10 days of this order.

order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order Preventing Plaintiff From Taking The Deposition Of San Francisco Department Of Public Works Director Carla Short And For Monetary Sanctions Against La Century Law

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For A Protective Order Preventing Plaintiff From Taking The Deposition Of San Francisco Department Of Public Works Director Carla Short And For Monetary Sanctions Against La Century Law.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion For A Protective Order Preventing Plaintiff From Taking The Deposition Of San Francisco Department Of Public Works Director Carla Short And For Monetary Sanctions Against LA Century Law is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
